title: 3D Red berry
description: Makes Minecraft to MC3D but copping by vanilla tweaks
body:
This pack that makes everything is 3D
Minecraft 1.0-1.15.2 never only

3D Difference types here
•The 3D door,s
•The 3D trapdoor,s
•The blocks with hand hold is 3D
•hand hold blocks with animations
•crystles 3D
•dreep stone 3D
•every deep dark 3D
•redstone wire 3D
•lily 3D
•vines 3D

Curseforge well reworked.
